global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with bold text and shapes, promoting a financial service.
global.main_message: Promoting a clear financial service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, in a lighter orange hue, positioned centrally.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'NovaPay' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label marked 'UGC' in a simple font, indicating user-generated content, located at the top left.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The text reads 'Your money, clearer No hidden fees' in a clear, bold font, centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is displayed in a prominent font, located just above the call-to-action button.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button labeled 'Book now' in a contrasting color, positioned at the bottom of the ad for easy visibility.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, key elements include bold text and abstract shapes.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the UGC label, main offer text in the center, price above the CTA at the bottom.
